> take brass key

## Library

> n

# +2 points
# You flip through the journal. Most entries are illegible, but one page
#   reads: "The treasure is hidden where water meets stone."
> open journal

> s

> s

# You brush off the grime. Despite its age, the coin has a satisfying weight.
> take rusty coin

> s

# You push aside one of the loose stones and discover a golden ring hidden

> push flat stones

> take golden ring

## Study

> up

# Unlock the cabinet
# You unlock the wooden cabinet.
> unlock cabinet with brass key
# Open the cabinet
# You open the wooden cabinet, revealing a silver locket.
> open cabinet
# GAME WON
# As you pick up the locket, it glows faintly. You feel a sense of
#   accomplishment. Congratulations! You have found all the secrets of this
#   place.
> take silver locket
